title: Pan-Seared Australian Mackerel with Fermented Vegetable Relish
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines the delicate flavors of Australian mackerel with the tangy kick of fermented vegetables.

ingredients.name: Australian Mackerel fillets
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, about 6 oz each

instructions: Season the mackerel fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the mackerel fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer the skillet to the preheated oven.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the fermented vegetable relish by mixing it with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the pan-seared mackerel with the fermented vegetable relish spooned over the top.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve immediately.
